achievements.description: Have me collect over 10,000 coins! I'm starting to get more comfortable now....

achievements.description: Have me collect over 20,000 coins! Now that's more like it!

achievements.description: Have me defeat over 750 enemies! This feels pretty nice!
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Wario Warfare
achievements.description: Have me defeat over 1,500 enemies! I could do this all day you little chumps!
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Home of the Knuckle Sandwich
achievements.description: Have me defeat over 2,500 enemies! Wahahaha! Just a bunch of losers!

achievements.title: You're Welcome! No, You're Not Invited to My New Castle!
achievements.description: Beat my game having rescued all 40 Spritelings. I'm such a nice guy! Now get outta here!

achievements.title: No Time For Losers!
achievements.description: Beat my game having rescued only one Spriteling. You have to understand, money was more important than you guys!
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Sorry...
achievements.description: Fine, I'll stop singing the song of my people. I'll run out of breath if you keep it paused for this long!
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker
